subject_a: Small quote-to-production idea for Siva Printers
email_body: Hello Siva Printers team, I noticed your site describes a process from physical sample and quotation through production and supply. I build small React and Python workflow tools, including a printing ERP-style project. I wondered whether a lightweight quote and job-stage dashboard could make status updates easier for your team. I can first show a small scoped demo rather than propose a large ERP. Would a 15-minute conversation be useful? Portfolio: https://darkraigamer212-cmd.github.io/career-application-kit/portfolio/ I am Deepan Karthick. If this is not relevant, please reply no and I will not follow up.
follow_up_1: Hello, following up once on the small quote and job-stage dashboard idea. I can tailor a short demo around one workflow if useful.
follow_up_2: Final note from me: happy to share a small printing workflow demo if this is relevant later. I will close the loop otherwise.

subject_a: Student software builder seeking one exporter pilot
subject_b: Referral request for a small workflow pilot
email_body: Hello TEA team, I am Deepan Karthick, a B.Sc. CS with AI student in Coimbatore building practical dashboards, report automation, and ERP-style workflow tools. I noticed TEA actively represents a large exporter network. I am not asking TEA to purchase software; I am looking for one member willing to discuss a small manual workflow that could be tested as a 3-10 day pilot, such as order status or reporting. Could you guide me to the appropriate person? Portfolio: https://darkraigamer212-cmd.github.io/career-application-kit/portfolio/ If this is not appropriate, please reply no and I will not follow up.
follow_up_1: Hello, following up once on my request for guidance to one exporter open to a small workflow pilot.
follow_up_2: Final note: I will close this request, but I would appreciate any future student/startup programme direction.

If this is not suitable, please let me know and I will not follow up.
